site.lede: Intelligent viewers for open plant-detection datasets. Pick a dataset to explore every image, class and annotation — filterable, inspectable, box by box.
site.note: More datasets are added over time. Each viewer renders from a compact, self-describing manifest built by prepare.py.

card.blurb: Aerial soybean fields with hairy fleabane and sourgrass annotated box by box, across estimated V3–V5 vegetative stages.

hero.lede: 763 aerial soybean images with hairy fleabane and sourgrass annotated box by box. Filter by class, collection and density — and inspect every detection.

credits.lead: The images and annotations belong to the WEED2C-Dataset, created by the authors below. When using this material, please cite the original work:
credits.citationHtml: TETILA, E. C.; MORO, B. L.; ASTOLFI, G.; DA COSTA, A. B.; AMORIM, W. P.; BELETE, N. A. de S.; PISTORI, H.; BARBEDO, J. G. A. Real-time detection of weeds by species in soybean using UAV images. Crop Protection, v. 184, p. 106846, 2024.
facts: UAV Phantom 4 Advanced · Sony 20 MP camera · 10 m altitude
Soybean V3, V4 and V5 — estimated from collection date + canopy coverage (Excess Green); the dataset does not label stage per image
LabelImg · Pascal VOC, with agronomist support
credits.note: Study project by Aurox, built on the Aurox visual system. Non-commercial.

footer.text: Dataset: WEED2C-Dataset · Tetila et al., 2024 · Crop Protection

card.blurb: Soybean and cotton seedlings on red soil — every leaf annotated as a COCO instance, with bounding boxes and segmentation masks.

hero.lede: 640 field images of soybean and cotton with every leaf annotated as an instance — 12,411 masks across two classes. Filter by class and density, then inspect every detection.

credits.lead: The images and annotations belong to the SoyCotton-Leafs dataset, created by the authors below. When using this material, please cite the original work:
credits.citationHtml: SEGRETO, T. H.; NEGRI, J.; POLEGATO, P. H.; PINHEIRO, J. M. H.; GODOY, R. V.; BECKER, M. A Leaf-Level Dataset for Soybean-Cotton Detection and Segmentation. Scientific Data, 2026.
facts: Multiple growth stages, weed pressures and lighting variations
COCO · leaf-instance bounding boxes + segmentation masks (YOLO11-validated)
credits.note: Study project by Aurox, built on the Aurox visual system. Non-commercial.

footer.text: Dataset: SoyCotton-Leafs · Segreto et al., 2026 · Scientific Data
